arts.ttl: Four observations from Bayern Munich’s 2-2 (4-3) aggregate loss to Inter Milan
arts.sum: Bayern Munich’s dream of a Champions League trophy being lifted in Munich is once again cut short. A disorganized performance saw Bayern bow out of the Champions League again.

arts.ttl: Match Awards from Bayern Munich’s miserable loss to Inter Milan inthe Champions League
arts.sum: But although Inter Milan gave them a tough time tonight, Bayern can be proud of their performance and can leave with their heads held high. The Argentinian international had an incredible game, scoring the goal that equalized in the early stages of the second half, almost immediately after Harry Kane scored for Bayern.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Postgame Show: Inter Milan 2-2 Bayern Munich; Inter advances 4-3 on aggregate (Champions League)
arts.sum: Bayern Munich traveled to San Siro to face off with Inter Milan in the Champions League for a match that was going to determine how many fans would feel about this season. Let’s dive into this one on the Bavarian Podcast Works — Postgame Show:

arts.ttl: Kompany on Bayern’s Champions League exit: “We did enough to win”
arts.sum: Speaking after Bayern's Champions League exit, Vincent Kompany said he felt Bayern created enough chances to progress.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star causes Champions League fury after shoving ball boy to the ground
arts.sum: Bayern Munich were knocked out of the Champions League at Inter Milan and Josip Stanisic caused anger when he pushed over a ballboy as the Germans sought a late goal

arts.ttl: Harry Kane discusses ‘criminal’ moments in which Bayern Munich lost Champions League tie
arts.sum: Bayern Munich were eliminated from the Champions League following a 4-3 aggregate defeat against Inter, despite a 2-2 draw on the night at the Giuseppe Meazza. The Englishman had levelled…

arts.ttl: Inzaghi: ‘Inter kept cool heads, want Champions League journey to keep going’
arts.sum: Simone Inzaghi was glad Inter ‘kept cool heads’ against Bayern Munich to reach their second...

arts.ttl: Pavard: ‘Inter set no limits’ in Champions League semi-final
arts.sum: Benjamin Pavard relished his first Inter goal, especially against his former club Bayern Munich, and...

arts.ttl: Thomas Müller reflects on his final Champions League game for Bayern
arts.sum: Thomas Müller shared his emotions after his final Champions League appearance for Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star shoves ball boy in hot-tempered Champions League defeat and risks UEFA wrath
arts.sum: The sides played out an epic 90 minutes in the second leg of their quarter final showdown with Inter emerging as 4-3 winners on aggregate
